items.title: Boeing Shares Finally Recoup Losses From 2024 Midair Fiasco
items.description: It closed at that exact price on Jan. 5, 2024, hours before a door-sized panel blew off of a Boeing jet during a flight operated by Alaska Air Group Inc. The stock tumbled as much as 45% in the 15 months after the incident.  Boeing shares have been on a roller-coaster ride since 2019.  Boeing is expected to deliver its first annual profit in seven years in 2026.

items.title: Ethiopian 787 Deal And Delivery Lead Might Change The Case For Investing In Boeing (BA)
items.description: Boeing and Ethiopian Airlines recently finalized an order for nine 787-9 Dreamliners, adding to a previous purchase of eleven 737 MAX jets and taking the carrier’s latest Boeing commitments to twenty fuel-efficient aircraft aimed at expanding its 145-destination long-haul network. Coming alongside Boeing’s report of 600 commercial airplane deliveries in 2025 and its first net-order lead over Airbus in seven years, the Ethiopian deal underscores how widebody demand and execution on deliveries...

items.title: Bernstein Raises Boeing (BA) Target, Names It Its “Top Pick in the US for 2026”
items.description: The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) ranks among the most active blue chip stocks to buy now. On January 6, Bernstein SocGen Group boosted its price target for The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) to $277 from $267, while maintaining an Outperform rating on the company’s shares. The firm named Boeing its “top pick in the US for 2026,” […]

items.title: Boeing Stock in Focus -- Ethiopian Airlines Orders Nine Boeing 787-9 Dreamliners
items.description: Analysts maintain optimism as Ethiopian Airlines expands its fleet with fuel-efficient Boeing jets

items.title: GE Aerospace Set to Report Q4 Earnings: Is a Beat in the Offing?
items.description: GE is heading into Q4 earnings with double-digit revenue growth expected, driven by strong engine demand, services strength and defense momentum.
